mapper.sql: id, sub_travel_id, sub_travel_name, in_people, out_people, income, report_matters, create_time, remark, id_delete,user_id,sub_scenic_id,report_time
mapper.select:
select a.id as id, a.sub_travel_id as travelId, a.sub_travel_name as travelName, sum(a.people_num) as inPeople, a.user_id as userId, report_base_travel.contact_people as contactPeople, report_base_travel.contact_phone as contactPhone, report_base_travel.travel_phone as travelPhone, a.report_time as reportTime from (SELECT * FROM base_travel_line_report ORDER BY report_time DESC LIMIT 1000) a left join report_base_travel on a.sub_travel_id = report_base_travel.id where a.id_delete = 0
and a.sub_travel_name like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or a.id like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') and report_base_travel.contact_people like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or report_base_travel.contact_phone like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') and report_base_travel.travel_phone like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or a.report_time like concat('%',#{keyword},'%')
GROUP BY a.sub_travel_id

SELECT sum( in_people ) inPeople, sum(out_people) outPeople, sum( income ) income, create_time createTime FROM base_travel_report where user_id =#{userId} and create_time like Concat(#{nowDate},'%') and id_delete = 0

select sum( in_people ) from base_travel_report
report_time like #{year}"%"

select sum( in_people ) from base_travel_report
report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime}
select sum(income) from base_travel_report where report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} and id_delete = 0
